title: Food Clips 18 Pcs with Storage Bag, Bag Sealing Clips for Sealing Food Storage Bags, Food Bag Clips in 4 Colors, Reusable Plastic Bag Clips for Food Storage for Sandwiches and Snacks (18 Pcs)
features: 【HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL & DESIGN】🛡️ OUTTELL's beautiful food bag clips are made of high-quality material which are air tight and ensures perfect sealing. The Premium design makes it very beautiful. These bag clips are built to last longer. The eye-catching colors and unique design make them easy to spot in your kitchen drawer 🌟

【USAGE】🔄 Our food clips are "A MUST HAVE" product for Kitchen!!! You should have them in YOUR kitchen all the time. They are eco-friendly and reusable, perfect for sealing various types of food bags. Range is vast, starting from snacks 🍿 to freezer bags. Keep your kitchen organized and your snacks easily accessible ♻️

【PACKAGE INCLUDES】Food Clips Bag Sealing Clips includes perfect 18 Pcs of clips for foods. They are super enough for YOU to use them multiple times. Since they are reusable, YOU will find them stay with YOU for long time :)

【COLOR & SIZE】These beautiful Food Pegs Clips come in multi-colors. These freezer bag clips come in different size (6 cm, 8 cm, 11 cm, 14.5 cm, 18 cm) . These food bag clips for food storage are must for your Kitchen🎨

【HASSLE-FREE MAINTENANCE】 Cleaning is a breeze – simply wipe them clean, and they're ready for their next use. Our bag clips provide a secure seal to keep air out and freshness in. No more worries about opened bags in your kitchen cabinets 🧹🌬️

【CUSTOMER HAPPINESS】is what we believe in! YOU are our PRIORITY. If You are not happy with our product, DON'T WORRY! We are happy to give back your valuable money with free item change. All the complaints, queries and suggestions are handled promptly.
